name: lyra-bug-hunter
description: Adversarial bug hunting for runtime behavior: Recon, Hunter, Skeptic, and Referee roles find, challenge, and confirm real bugs with evidence discipline, then fix them one verified commit at a time. Scopes to full tree, path, branch diff, PR, or staged files. Integrates with lyra-security-appsec, lyra-ci-cd-automation, lyra-de-slop.
